titleStmt.title: SII 39.63: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 63. (A.R. No. 63 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (INSIDE). JAḌĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDRAPĀṆḌYADĒVA-10+1 = 11TH YEAR, 13TH CENTURY A.D.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the sale of the Kārāṇkiḻmaikkāṇi right of some tirunāmattukāṇi land in the village of Muḷḷikkuḍi alias Muḍivalaṅgu-Perumālnallūr which was a dēvadāna village in Kāṉā-nāḍu, to Vīrapāṇḍya-Kālingarāya, a native of Kalyānasundaranallūr, to cultivate the grains like paddy, millet, pepper, gingili, sugarcane, betel leaves, turmeric, ginger etc, and supply to the temple at Tiruppuvaṇam in Andanāḍu. The two signatories mentioned in No. 62 also appears in the present inscription.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī koṟcaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 vatukku Etirāvatu kaṟkaṭanāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu navamiyum veḷḷikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Avaśvati nā
ḷ puṟamalai nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyanāyaṉār tirukkoyili śrī rutrar śrī māheśvarak kaṇakkar cikāriyañceyvār koyiṟ kaṇakkar Ivvaṉaivom Aṇṭanā
ṭṭu tiruppūvaṉamuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevar tāṉamāṉa kalliyāṇa cuntaranallūruṭaiyāṉ pūmitevaṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷāṉa virapāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāyaṟku kāṇikiḻ
maikkāṇi pramāṇam paṇṇik kuṭutta paricāvatu Innāyaṉār tirunāmattukāṇiyāṉa kāṉaṉāṭṭu muḷḷikkuṭiyāṉa muṭivaḻaṅkum perumāḷ nallūr perunāṉ kellaiyā
vatu kiḻpārkkellai Ūravāy Ellaikkum cempiyataraiyaṉ kuṭikāṭṭu Ellaikkum mēṟku Ellai vāyil nāṭṭi tiruccūla stāpaṉattukku meṟkum teṉpāṟ kellai
Ūṟpārkkellaikkum tuṟumpaṟṟu kaṇmāḷar kuṭikkāṭṭu Ellaikkum meṟku Ellai vāyil nāṭ tiruccula stāpaṉattukku meṟku teṉpāṟ kellai
ta tevaṉkuṭikāṭṭukkum Immaiye tiruvāḷaṉkuṭikkāṭṭukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapārk kellai Immaiye tiruvāḷa naṭuviṟkuṭikā
ṉa Ellaikkum Ellaikkum teṟkum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉ kellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nañce puṉceyum nattamum nattappār kuḷamum kuḷap m maramum maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉa stapraptikaḷum Uṭpaṭṭa Asattukkum Itaṉ vaṭakku naṭuviṟ kuṭikāṭu nāṉ kellaikkum nā kurucca
ppaṭṭa nañce puṉceyum nattamum nattayā ku muṭicūvātta kaḷum kiṇaṟum maramum maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa samasta prāptikaḷum
kuṭikkāṭu Iraṇṭukkum perppaṭṭa Ellaikkāṭum Eppeṟpaṭṭa samastaprāptikaḷu Aṉaittum cantirātyavaṟ cella kuṭiniṅkāk kāraṇkiḻamaik kāṇiyāka vi
ṇam paṇṇik kuṭuttom virapāṇṭiyak kāḷiṅkarāyaṟku muṉ collappaṭṭa Aṉaivomum Ippaṭi kuṭiniṅkāk kāraṇkiḻamaik kāṇiyāka varatāṇam paṇṇikku
perumāḷ nallūṟkum naṭuviṟkkum kuṭikāṭṭukkum Ivar pakkal kāraṇmai mutalāka muṉṉāl Ivvamal pakkal vāṅkiṉa ta ṇa
mutala kuṭukkavum Uṭaiyārt tiruvāvāṇa mutalukkam paṟṟiṉa Irāci Uḷa Ippaṇam Irunūṟum kāram Ēṟṟikkaccilayaṟkaṉākar koṇṭu cantarātittavaṟ cella pramāṇam paṇṇi
kuṭutta Ikkuṭikāṭu Iraṇṭukkum pacāṇam kuṟuvai tiṇai miḷaku Eḷḷup payaṟu karumpu veṟṟilaik koṭikkaruṇai mañcaḷ Iñci vāḻai vaḻutalai kaḻinir maṟṟum Eppeṟppaṭṭa
ṭṭu ceytu koṇṭu veṇṭum maraṅkaḷum vaittu puṉṭukkaḷum payiṟceytu koṇṭu nattamum kuṭiēṟṟik koṇṭum māvaṭai ciṟṟayam maṟṟum
peṟpaṭṭa Aṉaittukkum cipaṇṭārattukku vāṭākkaṭamaiyāka Oṭṭu nicceyitta Aṉṉāru vaḻaṅkum paṇam pattum tirukkoṭṭakka kāliṅ Aḷakkum 2 100 10kalam Ippa
ṇmaṭattu nellūruk kalamum tevaṟukkummiṭattu pacāṉattukku tai mātam mutal Āṉimātavaraiyiṟ yiṟṟa pattāṟum mātam mutal mārkaḻi māta varaip
ttilaṉālum cel viṟuppatakavum Ippaṭi cammatittuk kāraṇkiḻamaikkāṇi pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Aḻakiya maṇavāḷapperumāḷ vīrapāṇṭiya kāliṅkarāyaṉ ṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
muṉ collappaṭṭa kāraṇ kiḻamaip kāṇiyāka pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta muḷḷikku muṭivaḻaṅkum perumāṉ ṟkum naṭu
Ippaṭi cantirātittava kāraṇkiḻamaikkāṇi pramāṇam paṇṇikkuṭuttom Ayaiṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruppuvaṉammuṭaiya nāyaṉār tevatā
tāṉam ta varaṇa cuntaraṉ Aḻakiya maṇavāḷap perumāḷ virapāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāyaṟku nāṭṭut tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tiru
kkoyi ṟaḻuttiṉ śrī māhe kuceyyār koyil kaṇakkar Ivvaṉaivomum Ivai kāriyam Iravinārāyaṉ tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
tevatāṉam liṅka Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku brahmarāyaṉa Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku coñṅpaṭṭa tevapiḷḷai
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ālla Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku mahādevar paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku paramepavaraya vaṉ Eḻuttu tirunila
yāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku periyapaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku māparapattiyam Uyyaneṟikaṭṭiṉāṉ Eḻuttu (1/2) pramāṇi neṉ Ikkoyiṟ ki
kaṇakkuppā ṭai Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 39.63 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
